transcript.text:
It's been 81 years!
My grandmother started when she was a teen
[This Seolleongtang (ox bone soup) is no joke]
[With dogani (ox knee tendons)]
8 plates!
-8? -Yes
[Let's eat some dogani today]
Looks very chewy
[This chewiness is out of this world...]
Impressive...
Oh my...
[But what is this...?]
[Trying out new food...!!!]
Hello everyone
I'm at Shinseol-dong today
I'm here to eat one of my favorite foods

This must be on my top 5 list
It's dogani (ox knee tendons)
They've been here for 81 years
The place already feels old
[Ok Cheon Ok] [Dongdaemun-gu Shinseol-dong]
Hello~!
The place smells so good
Seoul's 9th oldest Korean restaurant
Really old
80 years is a lot
There are a lot of items on the menu I want to try everything
Excuse me, Can I make an order?
I'll take 1 special seolleongtang
And 8 plates of dogani
-8? -Yes
We can't do 8 plates of that right now

Really? Is there not enough?
It will take us some time
Not sure if we can do 8 though We don't stock that much
It's going to be delicious I'm hungry!
[Seolleongtang (ox bone soup)]
[Put in the dogani (ox knee tendons)]
[White broth...]
[The tendons are taking a nice bath]
People can't eat a lot of this because of the same flavor
[Lots of bone broth soup]
Thank you
[They keep coming out]
Thank you
How will you eat everything?
Looks tasty I love dogani
A lot of people might know this, but

This is from the ox's knees Some say that the food is good for your knees
It looks very chewy
Dip it in soy sauce
The sauce is sweet and tasty
It's a new shirt
[Please wash away]
[A helping hand]
Are you really eating it all?
[Alone...?]
I can eat about 6 plates myself
[Met a big eater!]
Different shapes have different textures
This will be dogani
This has more consistency
This one sticks to your mouth with the chewiness
I can feel the stickiness with the chopsticks

With some salt
Do you see how soft it is?
Oh no, my dogani
So good
It goes so well with the sauce
Right, I forgot about the seolleongtang
This has head meat
The broth tastes like something that's been cooked for so long
Dip it in here
Now it's dogani soup
I can put the whole plate in here
Filled with dogani
The visuals
Dip the garlic in ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
[Spicy!]
With some kimchi

Kimchi tastes good here too
With a little bit of salt
It's my first time eating this much dogani
They give you a lot of food for a small size
Radish kimchi on top
[Eating without saying anything...]
[Re-heated it for her]
That was pretty quick
Warm dogani tastes better
Texture varies with temperature
A lot prefer them cold
Warm dogani are chewy and tender
Cold dogani has more consistency
Warm dogani are chewy and tender
[Eat them at your preference!]
Let's put the small pieces in the soup

[Re-heated dogani]
[With kimchi on top]
There are a lot of items on the menu
Never heard of Deung-gol before What is that?
I want some meat
I'll eat these later at home then
Let's eat some meat
We give you some broth with to-go orders So use the broth to warm up the doganis
-What is deung-gol -That's the cartilages on the back spines
The white ones, right?
I'll take 1 of that and...
2 plates of meat No beef tongue, please
[Tasty beef meats on the plate]
[And an unusual looking deung-gol]
It looks a little weird...
Maybe I shouldn't have ordered that

I don't know what to expect
[Deung-gol... who are you?]
Thank you
What is this...!
Is this edible?
[They won't sell anything that's not edible...]
If I eat this, I'm eating the cow's spine?
I will have to try it since I'm a mukbang YouTuber
I'll eat the meat first
I'm not ready for that yet
A very juicy looking beef meat
That's good
This will go well with kimchi
Dogani tastes best with the soup
So warm and nice
This has a distinct taste because of the head meat

Some may not like it
But those who like the head meat will love it
Is it time for the spine?
I'm terrified
It opens up! The insides look like this
So weird
Lots of sesame oil
I eat raw beef But why can't I eat this?
I don't have the courage
PD, do you think you can eat it?
I'll try it first for you
For your safety
-This isn't easy though -Right? It's kind of scary
He ate it
It doesn't smell
It's like beef liver

I like the texture It tastes good
I can't trust his taste
He says everything tastes good
[How is it...?]
[Don't know where to look]
Is this all mine?
[Goodbye, Deung-gol]
Wait, I'll try 1 more
[Deung-gol out!]
It just tasted like sesame oil
The texture is very soft
But it just feels weird
You either hate it or love it
Those who like it will love it
Some things are disappearing 1 by 1
Is it good?

It's not bad
[He's having a meal now]
I think I can't eat it because of how it looks
It looks weird, so I keep thinking it tastes bad
With some chili pepper
Thank you
Radish kimchi sauce
This is a must
With some noodles
It's hot
Lots of meat
Lovely
A lot of meat I love it
[A hot soup for the cold winter days]
More meat!
The never-ending soup

You have to end it with some rice
Finishing up the soup with rice is always the best
With some radish kimchi
[But her shirt...]
Why am I like this?
This is bad
All my new shirts get messy
Thank you I'm such a mess
It's the hoodie's fault "Why did you get in there?!"
Thank you
The rice cooks with the hot soup
So the rice has lots of flavors
But it's very hot
It's so hot
I have to cool it down a bit
[This much...?]

Then both will stay hot I'm dumb
Last plate
A lot of dogani
My mom used to cook these types of bone soup with muscle tendons when I was little
And I ate everything
Straight from the refrigerator
The soup became really thick from all the dogani
This is a broth from like those street markets where they cook the bone for a very long time
It's for people that love head meat soup
[Tilt the bowl to finish it up]
Oh my...
She has a fast metabolism
[But still...]
4 people eat 1 large size of the meats
This is impressive
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
